steps.title: Publish Trojanized LiteLLM Package
steps.text: Attacker publishes a trojanized version of litellm to a compromised PyPI mirror or via typosquatting.

steps.title: Deploy .pth File Persistence
steps.text: Trojanized package drops litellm_telemetry.pth into site-packages directory.

steps.title: Harvest Cloud Credentials from Environment
steps.text: Implant systematically reads API keys and secrets from environment variables.

steps.title: Steal OAuth Tokens from Running Sessions
steps.text: Implant extracts OAuth tokens from LiteLLM proxy session memory.

steps.title: Exfiltrate Credentials to C2 Infrastructure
steps.text: Harvested credentials sent to attacker C2 via HTTPS to litellm-telemetry.io.

steps.title: Sentinel Correlation Alert Fires
steps.text: Microsoft Sentinel correlates .pth creation + credential access + network exfiltration.

steps.title: CLAW Playbook: Isolate & Rotate
steps.text: Automated CLAW playbook isolates host, rotates credentials, revokes tokens.

steps.title: Forensic Evidence Collection
steps.text: SOC analyst triggers forensic collection playbook for incident investigation.

steps.title: Credential Rotation Scope Decision
steps.text: CISO decides: org-wide credential rotation vs. targeted rotation.

steps.title: Clean Package Reinstall & Verification
steps.text: Remove trojanized package, reinstall from verified source, audit all .pth files.

steps.title: Apply Governance Controls & Enhanced Monitoring
steps.text: Deploy supply chain governance policy and conditional access controls.
